Name: news
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."news" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."user_departments" h WHERE h."user_id" = $1::uuid)) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."title" AS "title", "_root.base"."content" AS "content") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
